title: Doctor Phase 0 handoff complete
body: Stratospheric Whirling Airstream completed jc-session-handoff for Memory/state contract doctor Phase 0. Continuity surfaces now record the Phase 0 ledger, corrected Phase 1 validation lane, no new Phase 1 work, clean entry-point sweep, absent .remember buffer, no escalation or decision-thread handoff, and routed fitness pressure.
